description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized egg with a smooth, slightly matte shell. Its surface is predominantly a warm brown color with subtle reddish and yellowish undertones, and it is covered in fine, natural speckling. The egg has an oval, slightly asymmetrical shape, with one end more rounded and the other more tapered. The shell appears hard and unbroken, with a natural, slightly porous texture visible up close. There are no visible cracks, markings, or artificial decorations on the surface. The overall appearance suggests it is a fresh, uncooked chicken egg.
description: A smooth, brown, speckled egg with a hard shell and natural matte finish.
description_view_0: The egg is seen from its broader, rounded end, showing a uniform brown color with subtle speckling.
description_view_1: This view highlights the egg's slightly asymmetrical profile and the gentle curve toward the narrower end.
description_view_2: The egg is viewed from the side, displaying its full oval shape and even coloration.
description_view_3: The narrower, more tapered end of the egg is visible, with a slight shadow and more pronounced speckling.
attribute_orientation: upright with the broader end at the bottom and the pointed end at the top
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as a food item in a kitchen or dining setting, ready for cooking or serving.
